heading: Dead Letter Queue
body:
Atlas Stream Processing supports the use of an Atlas database collection as a
[dead letter queue](manual/reference/glossary) (DLQ). When Atlas Stream Processing cannot process a
document from your data stream, it writes the content of the document
to the DLQ along with details of the processing failure. You can assign
a collection as a DLQ in your stream processor definitions.

To learn more, see [Create a Stream Processor](streams-manage-create).
